lines: Yes' avukiye mw isi, Yakuriye muri yo, Yigishwa n'lmana, Se, Gusobanukirw' isi.
Yesu yitegereje Ubugome bwo mw isi; Areby' uko bungana, Arababara rwose.
Nukw asang' ab'iyi si Banze gukiranuka; Bamuyoberwa rwose, Bati : Si we
Yes' abony' ibyo byose Arabababarira,Ngo n' a bo gucungurwa No kubon'
Nukw amenya kw ari We Uwiteka yatanze Kubaber' igitambo Cyo kubahongerera.
Ntiyashidikany' ubwo, Yemera guhemurwa, Yiteguzwa n'lmana Kudupfir' a bo mwisi.
Maz' abantu bo mw isi Bamubamba ku giti, Bamubabaza cyane :Ni ko yadukijije.
Mwami Yes' ushimirwe Ubwo buntu wagize! Wemeye kumbambirwa : Nzahora
